scene_summary: A quiet parchment plate with pressed botanical repairs, a blue orbital filament knot, a low waveform ruler seam, small punched lights, a dark miniature window, a torn receipt slit, and stamp-like paper interruptions embedded as real source surfaces.
usable_surfaces: pressed translucent flower repair at lower center-left
blue filament orbit knot at right-center
vertical torn receipt slit near upper center
dark layered aperture at upper right
perforated stamp rectangle in faint grid at upper left
small isolated bud on left stems
badge-like circular pinhole near upper right-center
notched paper/image cut at lower right

detected_objects.label: hero digital bouquet repair
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large translucent pasted botanical repair with pale torn paper islands, pink wash, yellow flower center, branching stems, and visible cracked tissue edges.

detected_objects.label: hero math orbit knot
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Luminous blue translucent filament loops gather into a dense orbital knot with small colored node dots and a pale blue cloud at the center.

detected_objects.label: visual instrument seam
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A continuous low horizontal band of tiny vertical black ticks and occasional taller waveform spikes runs along the bottom paper edge.

detected_objects.label: moe compliance pinhole
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Tiny gold-centered badge puncture set inside a dotted circular pastel halo, visibly distinct from the parchment.

detected_objects.label: generative horse dark window
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small dark rectangular aperture at upper right with layered torn beige edges and fine tan crossing lines inside the dark blue-black window.

detected_objects.label: last-one image cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-right clipped paper/image cut with pinned corners, folded diagonal crease, torn staining, and an uneven notched lower-left edge.

detected_objects.label: stamp-album perforation
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Pale stamp-like rectangle inside a faint ruled album grid, with scalloped perforation teeth visible along the top, sides, and bottom.

detected_objects.label: last-one image cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: stamp-album perforation
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is sparse and expressionist: a few dominant anchors float in broad parchment negative space, with fine seams and pinholes adding detail without becoming clutter.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
